sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ الضِّيَافَةُ جُزْءًا أَسَاسِيًّا مِنَ الثَّقَافَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Gostoprimstvo se smatra osnovnim dijelom arapske kulture.
sentences.translationEn: Hospitality is considered a fundamental part of Arab culture.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَقْبِلُ الْعَرَبُ ضُيُوفَهُمْ بِحَرَارَةٍ وَيُقَدِّمُونَ لَهُمُ الْقَهْوَةَ وَالتَّمْرَ.
sentences.translation: Arapi toplo dočekuju svoje goste i nude im kafu i hurme.
sentences.translationEn: Arabs welcome their guests warmly and offer them coffee and dates.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ النَّاسُ أَنْ يَشْعُرَ الضَّيْفُ بِأَنَّهُ فِي مَنْزِلِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi vole da se gost osjeća kao kod svoje kuće.
sentences.translationEn: People like the guest to feel at home.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْعَادَةُ تَعْكِسُ الْكَرَمَ وَالِاحْتِرَامَ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj običaj odražava velikodušnost i poštovanje među ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: This custom reflects generosity and respect among people.
